misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, a familiar face from St. Laurence Golf, brings a unique blend of power and finesse to the greens of the Hector Trophée. Known for his booming drives and the signature "power draw" that shapes his shots, Jussi is a formidable presence on the course.

With four appearances at the Hector Trophée, Jussi is always a tough competitor. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Jussi's dedication and passion for the game are undeniable. Although he will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, Jussi remains an active member of the Hector Trophée community.
